LanguageData.VQE_PackDrone.label: pack drone
LanguageData.VQE_PackDrone.description: An automated utility drone designed primarily for heavy hauling and caravan support. Its large frame and high carrying capacity allow it to transport bulk resources in a caravan.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. Unlike other drones, pack drones don’t require connection to drone transmitters.
LanguageData.VQE_PackDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
